pr.title: Record: AdamW TTT 30ep Cosine + Per-Layer LR (val_bpb: 1.0705)

output.summary: Whole-validation TTT uses AdamW with 30-epoch cosine decay and per-layer LR multipliers to adapt the PR #549 quantized model before sliding-window eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT trains on the entire validation token stream (validation-shard training) before scoring, so the run is a val-only adaptation.
techniques: Per-layer LR multipliers for mlp projections
